Цепочка взаимодействия (главный цикл Redux)"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"[Пользователь или событие] 
      ↓
  dispatch(action)
      ↓
     Reducer
      ↓
    Новый state
      ↓
     Store
      ↓
   Обновление UI
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔹 3. Пошагово"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 1. Store создаётся с помощью reducer’а"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"import { createStore } from 'redux'

function counterReducer(state = { count: 0 }, action) {
  switch (action.type) {
    case 'INCREMENT':
      return { count: state.count + 1 }
    default:
      return state
  }
}

const store = createStore(counterReducer)
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"store"},{"type":"text","text":" теперь:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"хранит текущее состояние,"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"может принимать "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"actions"},{"type":"text","text":" через "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"dispatch()"},{"type":"text","text":","}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"может уведомлять подписчиков через "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"subscribe()"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 2. Action описывает, "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"что произошло"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"const action = { type: 'INCREMENT' }
"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Это просто объект с полем "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"type"},{"type":"text","text":" (и иногда "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"payload"},{"type":"text","text":" — данными)."}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 3. Action отправляется через dispatch"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"store.dispatch(action)
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"→ "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"store"},{"type":"text","text":" получает действие и передаёт его в reducer."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 4. Reducer получает state и action"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"function counterReducer(state = { count: 0 }, action) {
  switch (action.type) {
    case 'INCREMENT':
      return { count: state.count + 1 } // новое состояние
    default:
      return state
  }
}
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"→ Reducer вычисляет "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"новое состояние"},{"type":"text","text":", не мутируя старое."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 5. Store сохраняет новое состояние"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Redux вызывает reducer → получает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"newState"},{"type":"text","text":" →"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"заменяет старое состояние на новое внутри "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"store"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🟢 6. Подписчики уведомляются ("},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"subscribe()"},{"type":"text","text":")"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"store.subscribe(() => {
  console.log('State изменился:', store.getState())
})
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"→ Каждый раз после "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"dispatch()"},{"type":"text","text":" вызываются все слушатели,"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"и React-компоненты (через "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"useSelector"},{"type":"text","text":") автоматически "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"перерисовываются"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔹 4. Визуально"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"          ┌──────────────┐
          │   COMPONENT  │
          │ (UI, React)  │
          └──────┬───────┘
                 │ dispatch(action)
                 ▼
          ┌──────────────┐
          │    STORE     │
          ├──────────────┤
          │ хранит state │
          │ вызывает      │
          │ reducer()     │
          └──────┬───────┘
                 │
                 ▼
          ┌──────────────┐
          │   REDUCER    │
          │ (чистая ф-я) │
          └──────┬───────┘
                 │ возвращает newState
                 ▼
          ┌──────────────┐
          │   STORE      │
          │ сохраняет     │
          │ новое state   │
          └──────┬───────┘
                 │ уведомляет
                 ▼
          ┌──────────────┐
          │ COMPONENT(UI)│
          │ получает новый state │
          └──────────────┘
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔹 5. Кратко"}]},{"type":"table","content":[{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableHeader","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Шаг"}]}]},{"type":"tableHeader","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Что происходит"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"1️⃣"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Компонент вызывает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"dispatch(action)"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"2️⃣"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Store передаёт action в reducer"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"3️⃣"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Reducer возвращает новое состояние"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"4️⃣"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Store обновляет state"}]}]}]},{"type":"tableRow","content":[{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"5️⃣"}]}]},{"type":"tableCell","attrs":{"colspan":1,"rowspan":1,"colwidth":null},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Подписчики ("},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"subscribe()"},{"type":"text","text":" или React-компоненты) уведомляются и перерисовываются"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔹 6. В React (через react-redux)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"В React всё то же самое, только обёрнуто хуками:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"javascript"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"const count = useSelector(state => state.count)
const dispatch = useDispatch()

<button onClick={() => dispatch({ type: 'INCREMENT' })}>+</button>
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"React сам подписывается на store и обновляет UI при изменениях."}]}]}
